author: caasion
description: This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff. Bridge the gap between your calendar and daily planning by creating a long-range plan for what you do everyday.

manifest.author: caasion
manifest.description: Bridge the gap between your calendar and daily planning by creating a long-range plan for what you do everyday.
manifest.name: Holos

name: Holos

releases.author: caasion
releases.description:
- Removed task/phase distinction in projects
- Reworked track and project active state
  - Active state calculations now start from project phase dates and propagates up to the track active state
- Use active state as organizational tool in Projects and Tracks views (Gantt view coming soon)
releases.name: v4.0.0-beta.2

releases.author: caasion
releases.description:
- Gantt
  - Organize gantt view by tracks instead by adding a header column of tracks
- Project
  - Fix sidebar styling by adjusting font sizes & moving the collapse/expand arrow to next to header
  - Fix phase card styling (make it match the figma design)
- Tracks
  - Make header take up the whole width instead
releases.name: v4.0.0-beta.1

releases.author: caasion
releases.description: A prerelease/testing version of Holos reimagined in version 4 intended to test for any bugs, missing features, or ux inconveniences.
releases.name: v4.0.0-beta - Holos reimagined

releases.author: caasion
releases.description:
3.5.1
- Added ability to hide inactive tracks

3.5.2
- Make UI respect track ordering
- Simple modal for track reordering

releases.author: caasion
releases.description: New! - Preview scheduled tasks and recurring habits from projects - Populate planner view with tasks and habits from projects - Scheduled tasks and habits display projects they belong to - Completing a project task in planner view will also complete the project task
releases.name: v3.5.0 Project Automation

releases.author: caasion
releases.description:
- Removed project phases (bye bye short-lived feature)
- Dnd to reorder project phases
- Fix active/inactive project filtering in Track card to consider phases
releases.name: v3.4.4

releases.author: caasion
releases.description:
- Added phase status selector to allow for phases to be active without being scheduled
- Added horizontal scrolling for projects in Tracks view
- Fixed project statuses with phases
releases.name: v3.4.2

releases.author: caasion
releases.description: Projects can now have phases, which are independent date components with their own task task lists. This is particularly useful for projects that may span different versions or have multiple iterations. Doing so will allow all the related project information to stay within the same project instead of having to create a project for every version or iteration of something you do. Other QoL/features: - Updated styling of tracks in gantt view - Projects can now be created as project notes (or be converted manually) - Removed datepicker toggle button artifact
releases.name: v3.4.0 Project Phases

releases.author: caasion
releases.description:
- Standardize styling across all views
- Add Obsidian leaf-based view switcher in views
- Add interactable functions for track labels in Planner view 
- Implement correct ordering for tracks in Tracks view and Planner view
- Renamed "Holos view" to "Planner view"
- Added circle-off icon to all Holos views
- Localize scrolling in a tracks view
releases.name: v3.3.0

releases.author: caasion
releases.description: New Gantt chart view!
releases.name: v3.2.0

releases.author: caasion
releases.description:
Overall, it's a lot more stable to use the Tracks view now!

* Features
  * Ability to edit track and project task in Tracks View with new Datepicker modal
* Quality of life
  * Ctrl+click to open track or project notes in Tracks View
  * Add appropriate overflow constraints (prevent stretching of columns or cards)
* Fixes
  * Correctly parse project tasks & implement ability to edit project tasks in Tracks View
  * DnD persistence for tasks in Holos view
  * Correct status display with checkbox-progress hybrid tasks
  * Correct date logic for effective dates in tracks and projects
  * Fix lagging-behind UI updates when editing tracks or projects in frontmatter
releases.name: v3.1.1

releases.author: caasion
releases.description:
Introduction of the tracks view, with it being integrated with the planner view!

Furthermore, all items are now stored within markdown files instead of the plugin's data.json.

Many, many, many more UI/UX and design improvements that come with this version!

Still not fully tested yet and may contain bugs.
releases.name: v3.0.0 beta

releases.author: caasion
releases.description:
Version 2 of Holos

- Updated planner view
- Drag and drop capability for tasks
- Track your time commitments
